# Image Assets

Add the following files here before deploying:

| File | Source | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `logo-nav.png` | `Logo_Transparent.png` | Transparent bg, ~240px wide |
| `favicon-32.png` | `Cat_Logo_Transparent.png` | 32×32px |
| `favicon-16.png` | `Cat_Logo_Transparent.png` | 16×16px |
| `apple-touch-icon.png` | `Logo_512x512.png` | 180×180px |
| `og-image.png` | `Banner_2048x1152_Transparent.png` | 1200×630px for social sharing |
| `avatar.jpg` | Your photo | Used on About page |

All logo source files are in your brand assets folder.
